title: Quick Question About The Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC

wikitext: []: Quick Question About The Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC)             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Nov 20, 2006 1:42 pm Just outta morbid curiosity, does anyone have any copy of the translated text to the game? I'm perfectly willing to play through it in a different language, but I'm wondering whether there is any script floating around that I could use. Even a Japanese script would be fine, so I could translate that myself to use when playing. Just, you know, letting this out there for the hell of it. And yes, I'm aware that the character art in the game is bad. <_<

Article: Quick Question About The Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC
[]: Quick Question About The Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC)             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Nov 20, 2006 1:42 pm Just outta morbid curiosity, does anyone have any copy of the translated text to the game? I'm perfectly willing to play through it in a different language, but I'm wondering whether there is any script floating around that I could use. Even a Japanese script would be fine, so I could translate that myself to use when playing. Just, you know, letting this out there for the hell of it. And yes, I'm aware that the character art in the game is bad. <_<
